---
title: "Instructor Only: Process Diagrams Practice"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Mermaid Reference

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  A[Choose dataset] --> B[Inspect variables]
  B --> C[Make exploratory plots]
  C --> D[Choose final question]
  D --> E[Polish final figure]
```

# ggplot Reference

```{r}
process_steps <- data.frame(
  step = c("Load", "Inspect", "Explore", "Focus", "Polish"),
  x = 1:5,
  y = 1,
  label = c("Load data", "Inspect variables", "Explore plots", "Choose question", "Polish figure")
)

arrows <- process_steps |>
  mutate(xend = lead(x), yend = lead(y)) |>
  filter(!is.na(xend))

ggplot() +
  geom_segment(
    data = arrows,
    aes(x = x + 0.28, y = y, xend = xend - 0.28, yend = yend),
    arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.15, "inches")),
    color = "gray40"
  ) +
  geom_label(data = process_steps, aes(x = x, y = y, label = label), fill = "gray95") +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0.5, 5.5), ylim = c(0.7, 1.3), clip = "off") +
  labs(title = "A Simple Visualization Workflow") +
  theme_void()
```
